skill: Ratios, rates, proportional relationships, and units
stem: A turtle moves at a speed of 7/12 inches per second. What is this speed, in feet per second? (12 inches = 1 foot)
rationale:
Choice B is correct. Since 12 inches equals 1 foot, a speed of 7/12 inches per second is equivalent to (7/12 inches / 1 second)(1 foot / 12 inches) = 7/(12·12) = 7/144 feet per second.

Choice A is incorrect; this is the speed in inches per second multiplied by 12, the wrong conversion. Choice C is incorrect; it results from dividing by 2 instead of 12. Choice D is incorrect; this is the number of inches in a foot.
